mcp_args.prompt:
Russian human-made hook collage, zine/trash-design DIY aesthetic adapted to 16:9 widescreen, torn paper strips, scotch tape, pink sticky notes, marker handwriting, highlighter pink brush on key Cyrillic words, fake phone screenshots (Wordstat, reviews, Telegram chat, analytics), meme reaction cutouts with rough edges, grunge paper texture background #F5F5F0, bold condensed Cyrillic headlines, layered scraps NOT corporate banner,
COVER ONLY — single 16:9 image, not a grid.
Blog host on COVER ONLY: preserve EXACT face likeness from reference — bright blue eyes, short dark brown hair, clean-shaven, no glasses. Skin: clean even tone, subtle professional retouch, natural studio lighting, no blemishes or harsh grain. Expression: warm friendly smile, approachable expert — NOT neutral serious portrait from reference. Pose reacts to article topic: point at key chart, graph, funnel, dashboard, table or highlighted number on the collage when it makes the hook clearer; eye contact with camera OR directed gaze at the UI element. Outfit, props: agent's creative choice for the meme hook — do NOT copy reference photo clothing unless scene_hint asks.
CRITICAL: preserve EXACT face likeness from input reference photo — follow blog-hero.json visual_lock.
Clickbait hook scene: герой с reference-лицом, шок/ирония SEOшника, Wordstat + ноутбук, крючок на клик.
Large readable Cyrillic meme caption: "15k ключей — 0 прочтений?".
Hook idea: SEO-текст, который люди дочитают — миф или workflow?.
Russian internet meme collage, ironic SEO humor, host points at caption or reacts dramatically.
Negative: English text, Latin UI, watermark, logo, generic stock photo, boring corporate infographic, vertical carousel 9:16, instagram story, polished ad, same meme 4 times, unreadable gibberish text, extra fingers

Professional Russian blog editorial UI mockup, clean SaaS dashboard aesthetic, light background #FAFAF7, accent #E85D4C, readable Cyrillic labels, 16:9 widescreen screenshot style,
Article section H2: «Зачем SEO и GEO в одной статье».
Таблица «SEO vs GEO» к секции «Зачем SEO и GEO в одной статье»: критерии, цели, что видит человек vs AI
looks like a helpful pasted screenshot with pink sticky note corner and scotch tape, human-made Notion/Google Sheets vibe, subtle shadow, high detail Cyrillic UI, no host face
Negative: meme impact font, cartoon mascot, watermark, English UI labels, blurry text

Clean Russian infographic workflow diagram, numbered steps connected by arrows, editorial blog style, colors #FAFAF7 #1A1A2E #E85D4C #FFD93D, 16:9,
Article section H2: «Структура longread: от семантики до читабельности».
6 шагов workflow longread к «Структура longread: от семантики до читабельности»: интент → семантика → outline → lead → факты → FAQ
readable Cyrillic step titles on torn-paper workflow strip, marker arrows, taped checklist scrap, practical how-to, no meme faces
Negative: meme, face closeup, watermark, chaotic collage, English text

Russian SEO article UI mockup showing FAQ accordion block and JSON-LD schema panel side by side, developer-blog aesthetic, light theme, 16:9,
Article section H2: «FAQ и schema: зачем и как».
UI mockup FAQ + JSON-LD schema для «FAQ и schema: зачем и как»
Cyrillic FAQ + schema JSON panel as fake browser/devtools screenshot with sticky note «проверь FAQ», helpful not meme, no host face
Negative: meme, cartoon face, watermark, English-only UI
